title: Daily duty-focused briefing (deadlines, meetings, open cases, disclosures)
context: Officials need a short, daily digest focused on their statutory duties: upcoming meetings, notice/records deadlines, open constituent cases, and pending disclosures. This daily briefing must be duty-focused only -- no campaign items, no optics items, no political agenda. It aggregates from the Imprint layer and casework faculty into a concise daily view, surfaced as a PWA-friendly page.
objective: Implement the daily duty-focused briefing that aggregates upcoming meetings, notice/records deadlines, open constituent cases, and pending disclosures into a short, duty-only digest -- never including campaign or political agenda items.
acceptanceCriteria: Surfaces: upcoming meetings (with notice deadlines), records/disclosure deadlines, open constituent cases with next-step reminders, and pending disclosure obligations
Contains no campaign, re-election, optics, or political agenda items; guardrail-enforced
Aggregates from the Imprint layer (task 006) and Casework faculty (task 014)
Designed for quick mobile review (PWA-friendly layout)
output: A merged PR implementing the daily duty-focused briefing aggregating meetings, deadlines, open cases, and pending disclosures into a mobile-friendly PWA page.
